languages.text: "Вы, я вижу, страх потеряли? Пошли вон, пока я не приказал{mf||а} блюстителям разогнать вас силой!"
"I see you have lost your fear. Get out of my sight before I order the enforcers to disperse you by force!"
languages.original_text: "Вы, я вижу, страх потеряли? Пошли вон, пока я не приказал{mf||а} блюстителям разогнать вас силой!"

traits.locale_text: "I see you have lost your fear. Get out of my sight before I order the enforcers to disperse you by force!"
"I see you have lost your fear. Get out of my sight before I order the enforcers to disperse you by force!"
"I see you have lost your fear. Get out of my sight before I order the enforcers to disperse you by force!"

languages.text: 「君たちは恐怖を失ったようだな。強制的に解散させられる前に、私の目の前から消えろ！」
languages.original_text: "I see you have lost your fear. Get out of my sight before I order the enforcers to disperse you by force!"

traits.locale_text: 「君たちは恐怖を失ったようだな。強制的に解散させられる前に、私の目の前から消えろ！」

languages.text: "Görüyorum ki korkunuzu yitirmişsiniz. İnfazcılara sizi güç kullanarak dağıtmalarını emretmeden önce kaybolun!"
languages.original_text: "I see you have lost your fear. Get out of my sight before I order the enforcers to disperse you by force!"

traits.locale_text: "Görüyorum ki korkunuzu yitirmişsiniz. İnfazcılara sizi güç kullanarak dağıtmalarını emretmeden önce kaybolun!"

languages.text: «Veo que han perdido el miedo. ¡Desaparezcan de mi vista antes de que ordene a mis guardias dispersarlos por la fuerza!».
languages.original_text: "I see you have lost your fear. Get out of my sight before I order the enforcers to disperse you by force!"

traits.locale_text: «Veo que han perdido el miedo. ¡Desaparezcan de mi vista antes de que ordene a mis guardias dispersarlos por la fuerza!».

languages.text: “我看你们是忘了恐惧的滋味。滚出我的视线，否则我就命令执法者武力驱散你们！”
languages.original_text: "I see you have lost your fear. Get out of my sight before I order the enforcers to disperse you by force!"

traits.locale_text: “我看你们是忘了恐惧的滋味。滚出我的视线，否则我就命令执法者武力驱散你们！”

languages.text: « Je vois que vous avez perdu votre peur. Hors de ma vue avant que je vous fasse disperser manu militari ! »
languages.original_text: "I see you have lost your fear. Get out of my sight before I order the enforcers to disperse you by force!"

traits.locale_text: « Je vois que vous avez perdu votre peur. Hors de ma vue avant que je vous fasse disperser manu militari ! »

languages.text: "Wie ich sehe, habt Ihr Eure Angst verloren. Geht mir aus den Augen, bevor ich den Enforcern befehle, Euch gewaltsam zu entfernen!"
languages.original_text: "I see you have lost your fear. Get out of my sight before I order the enforcers to disperse you by force!"

traits.locale_text: "Wie ich sehe, habt Ihr Eure Angst verloren. Geht mir aus den Augen, bevor ich den Enforcern befehle, Euch gewaltsam zu entfernen!"
